text.title: puppeteer-launch-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for puppeteer-launch-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using await page.waitForTimeout(N) to pause execution.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: waitForTimeout was deprecated and removed in Puppeteer 22. Use new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, N)) or preferably a targeted waitForSelector/waitForFunction instead of fixed sleeps.
